claims.summary: Accumulated shared traces can be meaningful sediment without proving reciprocal relationship.
claims.disposition: verify provenance refs and separate observed, derived, and interpreted history

claims.summary: A correspondence bridge needs a durable ledger, thread identity, and peer-owned envelopes.
Shared-memory state must preserve whose memory or interpretation each field represents.
claims.disposition: verify witness self/other provenance and parent references

claims.summary: Increasing correspondence priority or spectral weight changes live influence.
claims.disposition: retain a Tier 5 operator wait with replay and abort requirements
